prompt:
Based on the title entered by the user This is the correct way to open GPT Image 2 prompts, generate a 2.35:1 horizontal high-impact text cover.

The overall style is black, white, orange, and red high-contrast "diagonal charge style". The main title is oversized, bold, tilted, with brush fragmentation and a sense of speed. The overall composition rushes from left to right.

The background is mainly white or light gray-white, with a small amount of orange-red diagonal color blocks, speed lines, bullseyes, arrows, crosshairs, and other tactical symbols.

A black horizontal information bar is added at the bottom, which automatically generates a short and powerful auxiliary copy consistent with the semantics of the title, using white characters + orange-red keywords.

The whole picture must present a communicative temperament of breakthrough, action, breakthrough, breaking the situation, and growth. Text is the absolute protagonist. The screen is clean, strong, eye-catching, and suitable for official account/social media covers.
